workflow.name: brownfield-onboarding

critical.mandate: Document existing state before proposing changes
Stories should only cover gaps, not re-implement existing features

step.title: Document Existing Project
step.action: Invoke document-project workflow to scan codebase
Capture: tech stack, architecture, existing features, code quality

step.title: Create PRD for Gaps
step.action: Start from existing features, identify gaps and improvements
Focus on what's MISSING, not what EXISTS

step.title: Map Architecture
step.action: Then propose target architecture for gaps

step.title: Create Epics/Stories
step.action: Invoke create-epics-stories for gap features only
Do NOT create stories for existing implemented features

step.title: Onboard Developer
step.action: Include: tech stack, conventions, patterns, open stories
step.template-output: Generate onboarding document with: existing project summary, gap analysis, architecture (as-is and target), stories for gaps, developer quick-start guide.

workflow.next-step: Run /gaia-readiness-check in the Claude Code terminal to validate implementation readiness before starting development.
